evidence: TASK-008 / FGAP-010 (gamma op-coverage parity check, landed dc7f514): scripts/parity-check.ts AST-enumerates pi-context library writers and classifies each against OP_COVERAGE_RULE; a silent ctx drop is fatal, a dual-surface optional-param mismatch is reported non-fatally.
